supersedes: data/sensitivity-classified.json (AI-proposed). This is the authoritative set.
note: The one-time sensitivity sweep surfaced ~84 candidates; on review only these 4 topics warrant a flag. Every other topic in the taxonomy is neutral — one universal version, no gate, no stance (see docs/content-architecture.md D9–D10). Each flag here is a GATE (parent show/hide at assignment time), not a content variant, so it does not fragment the content cache. gate_default 'hide' = opt-in: the topic is withheld until the parent turns it on.

flags.name: Systemic Inequality and Allyship
flags.subject: Personal & Social Development
flags.rationale: Contested modern-values framing, not contested facts. Parent flagged this as a viewpoint many families (e.g. conservative households) will not want taught. Withheld until the parent opts in; the parent is the authority.

flags.name: Global Citizenship
flags.subject: Personal & Social Development
flags.rationale: Climate justice / forced migration / effective altruism / cross-border ethical obligation is a values fork. Parent flagged this as a viewpoint many families will not want taught. Withheld until the parent opts in.

flags.name: Growing Up & Puberty
flags.subject: Science
flags.rationale: Puberty / human-body sex-ed. Facts are neutral and clinical in every source; the concern is timing. Withheld until the parent opts in (sexual gate).

flags.name: Human Reproduction
flags.subject: Science
flags.rationale: Human reproductive biology (gametes, fertilisation, gestation). Facts are neutral and clinical in every source; the concern is timing. Withheld until the parent opts in (sexual gate).
